name: Roar of Awakening (EOF)
detailLines: Stored Roar of Awakening special attack for Essence of Finality.
Deals an initial 130%-160% hit, then six 170%-200% burn hits.
Applies the live Soulfire and Conflagrate state described on the weapon page.
description: Stored Roar of Awakening special attack for Essence of Finality.
